review_text: The sound quality on these earbuds is phenomenal. Deep bass, clear mids, and crisp highs. Best audio I've experienced in this price range.
Battery life is disappointing. They claim 8 hours but I barely get 4.5 hours on moderate volume. Not acceptable for the price.
I wear these for 3-4 hours straight while working. No ear fatigue at all. The silicone tips fit perfectly. Very comfortable and lightweight.
The active noise cancellation barely blocks anything. Traffic noise, office chatter — it all comes through. Expected much better ANC at this price.
The hinge on the charging case broke after 2 months. The earbuds themselves feel plasticky. Build quality is a serious issue.
At this price point, you get good sound, decent ANC, and a comfortable fit. Excellent value. Would recommend to anyone on a budget.
The companion app crashes constantly and has the worst UI I've ever seen. EQ customization is impossible to use. Fix the app please.
Got the product in 2 days. Packaging was excellent — double boxed with foam inserts. No damage. Happy with the delivery experience.
Tried to get a replacement for a defective unit. Support took 3 weeks to respond. No resolution yet. Terrible customer service experience.
If you love bass-heavy music, these are perfect. The low-end response is punchy and tight without being muddy. Sound quality is a 10/10.
After the firmware update, battery life dropped from 6 hours to about 3. Something is seriously wrong with the battery management.
Nothing spectacular but nothing terrible either. Sound is good, fit is okay, battery is average. A solid mid-range option.
The ear tips don't stay in place during workouts. Keeps falling out every 10 minutes. Comfort and fit is a problem for active use.
After the latest update, ANC has gotten better. Still not class-leading but it blocks most ambient noise now. Improvement noted.
At this price point there are better alternatives. The build quality and battery life don't justify the premium pricing.
Incredible noise cancellation. Tested in airplane, busy office, and metro. Blocks out everything. ANC is genuinely class-leading.
They fit well in the ear but after 2 hours you feel the weight. Not the most comfortable for long listening sessions.
Expected better sound quality at this price. The default tuning is very flat and lifeless. Bass is almost non-existent.
10 hours of continuous playback with ANC on. Battery life is insane. I charge once every 3 days with normal use.
Metal charging case, ceramic earbuds, excellent build quality overall. Feels premium in every way. Built to last.
The app is buggy and lacks basic features. Can't even save custom EQ presets. App experience is the weakest link.
For the price, you get flagship-level ANC, great battery, and premium build. Sound could be better but overall amazing price to value ratio.
Box was crushed and one earbud had a scratch. Delivery and packaging needs improvement. Returned for replacement.
Had an issue with pairing. Customer support responded within 24 hours and guided me through the fix. Great support experience.
Sitting in a noisy cafe right now and I can't hear a thing. The ANC on the Max is genuinely the best I've tested. Worth every penny.
The nozzle is too wide for my ear canals. After an hour, my ears start hurting. Comfort and fit is subjective but didn't work for me.
I'm getting over 11 hours of battery with ANC turned off. Even with ANC on, solid 9 hours. Battery life is a major strong point.
Out of the box the sound was disappointing, but after tweaking the EQ in the app, it sounds much better. Bass boost makes a big difference.
Yes it's pricey, but the combination of ANC, battery, and build quality justifies it. You get what you pay for.
The charging case lid has some wobble to it. Doesn't feel as solid as the earbuds themselves. Minor build quality nitpick.
